paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **disentangled attention**—each token is represented by two vectors (content + position), allowing separate computation of attention weights based on content and relative positions. Also incorporates an **Enhanced Mask Decoder** that integrates absolute word positions into decoding for improved masked token prediction
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: English Wikipedia, BookCorpus, OpenWebText, Stories (Common Crawl subset)
raw_extraction.application: Natural Language Understanding (NLU), Natural Language Generation (NLG), downstream NLP tasks
raw_extraction.license: Open-source (likely Apache 2.0 or similar, inferred from Microsoft affiliation)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving transformer-based language models for better contextual understanding and generalization across NLP tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: DEBERTA: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Same innovations as DeBERTa Base (disentangled attention + enhanced mask decoder) but scaled up with deeper architecture (48 layers) and increased capacity for improved performance on complex tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: English Wikipedia, BookCorpus, OpenWebText, Stories (Common Crawl subset)
raw_extraction.application: Advanced NLP tasks including GLUE benchmark, SuperGLUE leaderboard, and human-level performance benchmarks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable improvement of transformer architectures for high-performance NLP applications
raw_extraction.paper_title: DEBERTA: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces the largest DeBERTa variant with 48 Transformer layers and 1.5 billion parameters, leveraging disentangled attention and enhanced mask decoder to surpass human baselines on SuperGLUE benchmark for the first time
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: English Wikipedia, BookCorpus, OpenWebText, Stories (Common Crawl subset)
raw_extraction.application: SuperGLUE benchmark, human-level evaluation, ensemble-based NLP systems
raw_extraction.research_problem: Achieving human-level performance in complex NLP tasks through massive model scaling
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned via SiFT (Self-Supervised Instruction Fine-Tuning) or discriminative fine-tuning
raw_extraction.optimizer: AdamW (implied, though not explicitly named; Adam is standard in transformer papers)
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Not explicitly detailed beyond base model training setup
raw_extraction.extension: Shared projection matrices for relative positional embeddings reduce parameter count while preserving performance, and convolutional embedding enhances sub-word granularity
raw_extraction.paper_title: DEBERTA: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Disentangled Attention**—dual vector representation (content and position) with separate attention matrices—and an **Enhanced Mask Decoder** incorporating absolute positions during pre-training, significantly improving performance over BERT and RoBERTa baselines
raw_extraction.application: Natural Language Understanding (NLU) benchmarks (GLUE, SuperGLUE, MNLI, SQuAD, RACE, etc.), text classification, question answering
raw_extraction.license: Closed-source (originally proprietary; later open-sourced under some conditions)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving bidirectional language understanding through novel attention mechanisms and pre-training techniques
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM) with disentangled attention and enhanced decoding
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning on downstream tasks (e.g., supervised classification, QA)
raw_extraction.hardware_used: 4x DGX-2 with 64 NVIDIA V100 GPUs (10 days for 1M training steps, batch size 2048)
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Same core innovations as DeBERTa Base but scaled up with deeper layers (12 layers, hidden size 768), achieving superior performance across all benchmarks while maintaining computational efficiency
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose NLU, including GLUE, SuperGLUE, and NLP applications requiring high accuracy
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling bidirectional language models with improved attention mechanisms
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM) with disentangled attention and enhanced decoding
raw_extraction.hardware_used: Null (not specified beyond base model training)
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces Token Detection (RTD) as a replacement for Masked Language Modeling (MLM), combined with disentangled attention mechanisms to improve parameter efficiency over BERT and RoBERTa
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, question answering, text classification
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning on downstream tasks (e.g., MNLI, SQuAD)
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Replaces MLM with RTD and implements base-size architecture with improved disentangled attention, achieving better performance than original DeBERTa with fewer parameters
raw_extraction.application: Natural language understanding, question answering, text classification
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning on downstream tasks (e.g., MNLI, SQuAD)
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a larger variant using RTD with deeper architecture (6 layers) maintaining same width as original DeBERTa, achieving state-of-the-art results with reduced parameter count relative to original DeBERTa-Large
raw_extraction.application: Advanced natural language understanding, complex reasoning tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: High-performance language understanding with parameter efficiency
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning on downstream tasks (e.g., MNLI, SQuAD)
raw_extraction.extension: Incorporates multi-head disentangled attention to enhance contextual understanding
raw_extraction.paper_title: DeBERTa: Decoding-enhanced BERT with Disentangled Attention
